rawAssistant: Before you head out, make sure to check that lanterns along your path are securely fastened; the last gale must have shaken loose some of them. You wouldn't want another blow to catch them off guard. And perhaps take a moment to recheck those road kit charms - they can be surprisingly temperamental in rough weather.
